name: io.github.wyre-technology/alternative-payments-mcp
title: Alternative Payments
description: MCP server for Alternative Payments — customers, invoices, payment requests, payouts, webhooks.

environmentVariables.name: ALTERNATIVE_PAYMENTS_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: OAuth client id (API key) from the Alternative Payments Partner Dashboard.

environmentVariables.name: ALTERNATIVE_PAYMENTS_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: OAuth client secret paired with the client id.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode. Set to 'stdio' for local CLI use; the image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Credential source: 'env' reads vars locally, 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway.

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
